_comment: CONFIG REFERENCE — not an importable file. Health Auto Export has no
'import automation from JSON' feature (REST API automations are entered by
hand and stored only in encrypted iCloud backups). This document mirrors the
app's automation screen field-by-field so you can transcribe it in ~1 minute.
Field names match the app UI; see docs/auto-export-direct.md for step-by-step.
Replace <API_ENDPOINT> and <INGEST_TOKEN> with your deployed values:
terraform output -raw ingest_url      # the URL below, ending in /ingest
terraform output -raw ingest_token     # the X-Auth-Token value
_metricsNote: These are the metric identifiers the parser understands (src/parser/
json-metrics.js). In the app you tick them by display name — e.g.
'Heart Rate Variability', 'Resting Heart Rate', 'Sleep Analysis'. Any metric
you add that isn't in this list is uploaded but silently ignored by the
parser, so it costs nothing to over-select.
